channel.title: 类 on 灏天阁
channel.description: Recent content in 类 on 灏天阁

item.title: 类
item.description: 类的定义和继承 class RadiusClass { constructor(r) { this.r = r; } circumference(r = this.r) { return 2 * Math.PI * r; } circle_area(r = this.r) { return Math.PI * r * r; } } class Cylinder extends RadiusClass { constructor(r, h) { super(r); this.r = r; this.h = h; } volume(r = this.r, h = this.h) { return super.circle_area(r) * h; } surface_area(r = this.r, h = this.h) { return 2 * super.
